summary: Vendor Resolution Observability + Negative Feedback Loop testing complete. All 71 unit and API tests pass. Both new endpoints (/api/vendor-resolution/metrics and /api/vendor-resolution/rejections) return correct structure. Existing endpoints unaffected.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard and Vendor Intel page load correctly)

seed_data_creation: No documents have vendor_resolution field yet (populated only during new pipeline processing). vendor_match_rejections collection is empty (no rejections captured yet).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Resolution Observability tests confirmed working. Key points: (1) GET /api/vendor-resolution/metrics returns all required fields (total_documents, resolved_count, unresolved_count, ambiguous_count, needs_review_count, resolution_rate, by_method, fuzzy_score_buckets, top_unresolved, top_corrected, total_rejections), (2) GET /api/vendor-resolution/rejections returns rejections array with count and supports limit/skip pagination, (3) build_resolution_object correctly sets status based on match method and score (alias_match/bc_exact_match -> resolved, fuzzy_match >= 0.95 -> resolved, fuzzy_match < 0.95 -> needs_review, no match -> unresolved), (4) capture_rejection creates new or increments existing rejection records, (5) check_rejection_guardrail blocks previously rejected matches, (6) set_vendor_for_document in workflow_handlers.py captures negative feedback when reviewer overrides auto-matched vendor and sets reviewed_override=true, (7) vendor_matching.py lookup_vendor_alias checks guardrail before returning fuzzy matches (lines 148-162), (8) No breaking changes to existing endpoints.

tests: returns rejection record for blocked matches

negative_feedback_in_set_vendor.behavior: Calls capture_rejection when reviewer overrides fuzzy_match/bc_exact_match

guardrail_in_vendor_matching.behavior: Checks rejection history before returning fuzzy match, adds guardrail_downgraded and resolution_status fields

coverage: MetricsEndpoint (3 tests: returns 200, response structure, numeric values)
RejectionsEndpoint (4 tests: returns 200, structure, limit/skip params)
